phrases.intent_en: Ask about the TGV to Paris
phrases.text_local: À quelle heure part le TGV pour Paris ?
phrases.pronunciation: ah kel UHR PAR leh tay-zhay-VAY poor pah-REE
phrases.cultural_note: TGVs to Paris take about 1 hour 50 minutes. There are departures every 30-60 minutes. Book early for the best fares.

responses.english: Check the departures board in the hall.
responses.french: Regardez le panneau des départs dans le hall.

phrases.cultural_note: Strasbourg is on the border. Direct trains to Freiburg (Germany), Basel (Switzerland), and other destinations.

responses.english: Direct trains to Freiburg and Basel. Check the board.
responses.phonetic: luh პრო-shan day-PAR eh byan-TOH, ruh-gar-DAY luh pah-NOH
responses.french: Des trains directs pour Fribourg et Bâle. Regardez le panneau.

phrases.intent_en: Ask where the luggage lockers are
phrases.text_local: Où sont les consignes à bagages ?
phrases.pronunciation: oo son lay kon-SEEN ah bah-GAHZH
phrases.cultural_note: Most French train stations have automated luggage lockers. They accept coins and sometimes cards.

responses.english: On the lower level, follow the signs.
responses.phonetic: oh nee-VOH an-fay-RYUHR, swee-VAY lay pah-NOH
responses.french: Au niveau inférieur, suivez les panneaux.

phrases.intent_en: Ask how to get from the station to the cathedral
phrases.text_local: Comment aller de la gare à la cathédrale ?
phrases.pronunciation: koh-MAHN ah-LAY duh lah gar ah lah kah-tay-DRAL
phrases.cultural_note: Strasbourg's Art Nouveau railway station, built 1878–1883, is a ten-minute tram ride or twenty-minute walk from the cathedral.

responses.english: By tram line A or B toward the centre, seven minutes.
responses.phonetic: ahn TRAM LEEN-yuh ah oo bay, dee-rek-SYON SAHN-truh, SET mee-NOOT.
responses.french: En tram ligne A ou B, direction centre, sept minutes.

phrases.intent_en: Ask where the tram stop is inside the station
phrases.text_local: Où est l'arrêt de tram dans la gare ?
phrases.pronunciation: oo ay lah-RAY duh TRAM dahn lah gar

responses.english: Outside the main exit, on the Place de la Gare side.
responses.phonetic: duh-VAHN lah sor-TEE pran-see-PAL koh-TAY plahs duh lah gar.
responses.french: Devant la sortie principale côté place de la Gare.
